'''Jubal''' was a [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]]<ref name="Empire Blues" /> who was living on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] immediately before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|II|176|Jubal}}</ref> Around the year [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="Date">The events of ''Empire Blues'' occur shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], which took part in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> Jubal and [[Oxbel]] were the only other Devaronians that [[Kardue'sai'Malloc/Legends|Kardue'sai'Malloc]], a Devaronian who went under the assumed name of Labria, knew to live on Tatooine.<ref name="Empire Blues" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jubal was first mentioned in "[[Empire Blues: The Devaronian's Tale]]," a short story written by [[Daniel Keys Moran]] that was included in ''[[Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina]]'', which was released by [[Bantam Spectra]] in 1995.<ref name="Empire Blues" /> Jubal was later used as an example name for Devaronians in [[2003]]'s ''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''<ref name="UAA">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref> and in [[2007]]'s "''Saga Edition'' Web Enhancement: Devaronians."<ref name="Devaronians">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sagaenhancementdevaronians|text=Saga Edition Web Enhancement: Devaronians}}</ref>
